about.title: Protecting Renters Across Canada
about.subtitle: PropertyCheck helps renters document their rental property condition with timestamped photos and professional reports.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description1: Every year, thousands of Canadian renters lose part or all of their damage deposit due to disputes over property condition. Without proper documentation, it's often your word against your landlord's.
mission.description2: PropertyCheck was built to solve this problem. Our app makes it easy to create timestamped, professional inspection reports that document exactly what condition your rental was in when you moved in and when you moved out.
mission.description3: With PropertyCheck, you have the evidence you need to protect your deposit.

easyDocumentation.title: Easy Documentation
easyDocumentation.description: Our guided inspection process walks you through documenting every room systematically.

legalEvidence.title: Legal Evidence
legalEvidence.description: Timestamped photos and reports that can support your case in deposit disputes.

peaceOfMind.title: Peace of Mind
peaceOfMind.description: Know that you're protected with professional documentation from day one.

step1.description: Take photos of every room with our guided inspection process. Each photo is automatically timestamped.

stillHaveQuestions.title: Still Have Questions?
stillHaveQuestions.subtitle: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Our support team is here to help.

q1.question: What is PropertyCheck?
q1.answer: PropertyCheck is a mobile app that helps renters document their rental property condition with timestamped photos and professional reports. It's designed to help protect your damage deposit by providing evidence of the property's condition at move-in and move-out.

q2.question: Is PropertyCheck free to use?
q2.answer: Yes! PropertyCheck offers a free plan that includes 1 property with move-in and move-out inspections, basic PDF reports, and photo documentation with 90-day cloud storage. Premium plans are available for renters who need unlimited properties, shareable links, and additional features.

q3.question: What platforms is PropertyCheck available on?
q3.answer: PropertyCheck is available on both iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play). You can also access your reports and account through our web dashboard.

q4.question: How do I create an account?
q4.answer: You can create a free account by downloading the app from the App Store or Google Play, or by signing up on our website. You can sign up with your email or use Google sign-in for faster access.

q1.question: How do I conduct an inspection?
q1.answer: Our app guides you through a systematic inspection process. Simply select the property, start a new inspection, and follow the prompts to photograph each room. The app automatically timestamps each photo and organizes them by room.

q2.question: What's included in the PDF reports?
q2.answer: Your PDF reports include all photos taken during the inspection, organized by room, with timestamps and any notes you've added. Premium reports include professional formatting without watermarks and can include comparison views of move-in vs move-out condition.

q3.question: Can I share reports with my landlord?
q3.answer: Premium subscribers can generate secure, shareable links that allow landlords to view inspection reports without creating an account. This ensures both parties have access to the same documentation.

q4.question: How long are my reports stored?
q4.answer: Free accounts include 90-day cloud storage. Premium accounts include unlimited storage, so your reports are available for as long as you need them.

q1.question: Are PropertyCheck reports legally valid?
q1.answer: While PropertyCheck reports are designed to provide strong documentation, their admissibility in legal proceedings depends on your jurisdiction. Our timestamped photos and detailed reports are accepted by many landlord-tenant boards as supporting evidence in deposit disputes.

q2.question: What makes the timestamps reliable?
q2.answer: Photos taken through PropertyCheck are automatically timestamped using your device's date/time and can include GPS location data. This metadata is embedded in the photo files and included in reports to help verify when and where photos were taken.

q3.question: Can PropertyCheck help me get my deposit back?
q3.answer: PropertyCheck provides the documentation you need to support your case in deposit disputes. By having clear evidence of the property's condition at move-in and move-out, you can demonstrate what damage (if any) was pre-existing vs. caused during your tenancy.

q1.question: What's the difference between Free and Premium?
q1.answer: The Free plan includes 1 property, basic reports, and 90-day storage. Premium adds unlimited properties, shareable links, comparison reports, unlimited storage, and priority support. Premium is available with a 7-day free trial.

q2.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
q2.answer: You can cancel your Premium subscription at any time through your account settings. Your subscription will remain active until the end of your current billing period, and you won't be charged again.

q3.question: Is there a money-back guarantee?
q3.answer: Yes! Premium subscriptions come with a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied, contact support within 30 days of your purchase for a full refund.

q4.question: Can I change my plan?
q4.answer: Yes, you can upgrade from Free to Premium at any time. If you're on a monthly Premium plan, you can switch to annual billing to save money. Changes take effect immediately.

q1.question: Why aren't my photos uploading?
q1.answer: Photo uploads require an internet connection. If you're having trouble, check your connection and try again. Photos taken offline are stored locally and will upload automatically when you're back online.

q2.question: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
q2.answer: Click 'Forgot password?' on the login screen and enter your email address. We'll send you a link to reset your password. If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.

q3.question: How do I contact support?
q3.answer: You can reach our support team by email at support@propertycheck.app. Premium subscribers receive priority support with faster response times.
